subject: royale
claim: Royale = paradox + reverse drifter; Red also calls it 'Paradox Grifter'. base_trick deferred — reverse-drifter is not yet a canonical row (direction-is-structural rule). 'Paradox Grifter' alias not adopted without confirmation.

subject: stalls
claim: Toe stall, inside stall, clipper stall, and osis are common base/anchor stalls used in many tricks. The ontology must also support non-stall primitives — kick/body tricks, sets, modifiers, and standalone compounds (e.g. flying-clipper, dragonfly, double-knee) — so this is not a universal decomposition rule.

subject: ripstein
claim: Ripstein = double swirl, 4 ADDs (pt4 confirmed). base_trick still unresolved: double-swirl is not itself canonical, and inventing one would force structure Red did not give.

subject: merkon
claim: Merkon = spinning legover, 3 ADDs. category=compound, base_trick=legover, modifier=spinning.

subject: terrage
claim: Terrage is its own mechanical family/category (parallel to barrage), not dex or compound. Few terraging moves exist (e.g. Terraging Leg Over).

subject: barrage
claim: Barrage is its own mechanical family/category (parallel to terrage), not dex or compound. Barraging Leg Over is Flurry.

subject: furious
claim: Furious is a related variant that turns Barrage into a set. Insufficient definition to add — needs follow-up question round before dictionary entry.

subject: fog
claim: Red pt5 says Fog = stepping + paradox + double leg over (= stepping + paradox + miraging legover). Current dictionary says Fog = blurry + eggbeater (= blurry + illusion-modified legover). Same 5-ADD count but structurally different base (legover via mirage vs legover via illusion) and different modifier stack. Defer pending Red's explicit reconciliation; do not silently reconcile.
